metadata.description: CraftWork: a GitHub-backed loop that turns lived-experience feedback into merged PRs, asking you only at genuine decision points.

plugins.name: craftwork
plugins.description: Capture an observation, let the loop ship it, decide only the forks it cannot. cw-feedback / cw-ship / cw-resolve plus the cw-scope / cw-orchestrate / cw-promote / cw-sweep initiative track.
